features.name: Document Import
features.description: Allow users to import PDF and TXT documents from local filesystem

features.name: Document Chunking
features.description: Split imported documents into ~500 character chunks with metadata (word count, line count, paragraph count)

features.name: Indexing Status UI
features.description: Display indexing progress in status bar: total docs, indexed docs, last sync time

features.name: Grounded Q&A
features.description: Run AI-powered Q&A over indexed content with citations to source documents

features.name: Conversation History
features.description: Display Q&A conversation in chat-style interface with copy/export functionality
